已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case

decision.archive_summary: Resolved regression-work thread for Codex minor GC in this repo. Durable context to retain as pins: live eval coverage was expanded to include harder natural Chinese multi-turn topic-switch cases; implementation should avoid whitelist-like hardcoding; packaged guard must not override a shadow-guard veto; guarded relation handling was adjusted to allow `continue`. The later subtask was to rerun the previously failing automated test/eval after these fixes.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active request at t11 was a continuation of the same GC regression/testing topic, but by t12 the requested rerun was already completed, so the thread is mostly resolved. Early turns t1-t8 are solved implementation history and good raw-eviction candidates. Their semantic content still matters as durable repo/task context, so key constraint-bearing turns are pinned. The latest user turn t11 is preserved automatically by the runtime and should not be listed for eviction.
